# PcGameArchive

> Free PC game downloads. Browse thousands of games across Action, Adventure, Horror, Indie, Open World, Simulation, Sports, Shooter, and Strategy categories.

## Site Information
- **URL**: https://pcgamearchive.com
- **Description**: Download the latest PC games for free. Browse by category, read reviews, and find system requirements.
- **Languages**: 34 languages supported
- **Content**: Game listings with descriptions, screenshots, system requirements, and download links

## Navigation
- Home: /en
- Categories: /en/action, /en/adventure, /en/horror, /en/indie, /en/openworld, /en/shooter, /en/simulation, /en/sports, /en/strategy
- Blog: /en/blog
- About: /en/about
- Contact: /en/contact
- Privacy Policy: /en/privacy
- Terms of Service: /en/terms
- Sitemap: /en/sitemap

## API / Data
- RSS Feed: /rss/rss-en.xml
- Sitemap: /sitemap_index.xml
